mapper.sql: select t.id, t.name, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.lname, coalesce(c.lname, t.lname) as chute_name, t.channel, t.status, t.create_time from yn_task t left join a_camera c on c.id = t.lname
mapper.insert: insert into yn_task(name, start_time, end_time, lname, channel, status, create_time) values(#{name}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{lname}, #{channel}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update yn_task set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from yn_task where id in
#{id}
